title: Cheesy Quinoa & Black Bean Taco Skillet
description: A quick, healthy vegetarian dinner featuring fluffy quinoa, protein-packed black beans, and melted cheese with classic taco spices.

ingredients.item: canned black beans, drained and rinsed

instructions: Boil water in a saucepan, add quinoa, then cover and simmer for 15 minutes until liquid is absorbed. Fluff with a fork.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Sauté onion for 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
Add bell peppers, jalapeno, and garlic to the skillet and cook for another 3-4 minutes until softened.
Stir in diced tomatoes with their juices, black beans, and all spices. Cook for 2-3 minutes to blend flavors.
Reduce heat to low, mix in the cooked quinoa, and top with shredded cheese. Heat until the cheese is gooey and melted.
Serve immediately with optional toppings like avocado, cilantro, or a dollop of Greek yogurt.
